positive: A vibrant and stylized abstract depiction of a mystical fox spirit (kitsune) merging with geometric jungle flora. The composition should feature the fox in a graceful, dynamic silhouette, surrounded by sharply contrasted, lush leaves, stylized vines, and luminous mandalas. Use a color palette dominated by deep turquoise, royal purple, earthy greens, and pops of neon gold. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern digital vector art, ensuring crisp lines and perfect separation for apparel printing. High contrast, centered composition, clean edges, maximalist design.
